scene: A refined editorial composition showing a visual workflow moving from prompt to reference image to edited artifact
subject: A bold original canvas symbol surrounded by three restrained workflow cards
composition: Vertical 4:5 poster with strong top-to-bottom hierarchy, symbol in the upper half, text in a clean lower block, generous margins
style: Modernist editorial poster with tactile paper grain and geometric shapes, polished but not corporate-stock
palette: Off-white, black, warm red, fog blue, and muted sand

text.placement: Project name at top, short line in the middle, descriptor at bottom
text.hierarchy: Large project name, medium action line, small descriptor

typography: Bold modern grotesk with crisp high-contrast lettering
constraints: render each supplied line exactly once and verbatim
no extra text, watermark, unrelated logo, illegible microcopy, or decorative lorem ipsum
